name: California Software Company Limited
summary: California Software Company Limited provides software development, business process outsourcing, and IT infrastructure services. It offers CLPM, a loyalty business management solution; CsIoT, an Internet of Things solution; CsDigital platform that provides cloud strategy services to design, deploy, and manage cloud environments; CsBigData, a big data analytics solution; CsCloud, a cloud computing solution; CLISAC, a clinical data management solution; CLIDAC, a clinical data warehouse and analytics console; and CASP, a chat-based artificial intelligence (AI) assistance system. The company also offers ARGCIC, a pharmaco-vigilance application; Chronscrapper, an automated data extraction tool used in structuring the data of PDF and scanned documents; EYWA, an AI assistant for doctors; and YesGeeCom solution that enables digital transformation of e commerce solutions by AI integration for business-to-business and business-to-customer segments. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Chennai, India.
